title: ServiceNow bets $40 million on Indian banking software specialist to expand its financial services push | TechCrunch
summary: ServiceNow, the U.S. enterprise software company known for automating workflows like IT service management and HR operations, is betting on an Indian banking software specialist to deepen its push into global financial services.
